steps.action: Initialize isolated project A and B directories with .bropilot data
steps.expected: Both projects available for scoped traceability testing
steps.observed: Project initialization succeeded via no-start init calls

steps.action: GET scoped traceability for both projects after write
steps.expected: Project A has the new entry; Project B remains empty
steps.observed: Project A entries count=1, Project B entries count=0
Old listener stopped; new beam process started and /api/health returned 200

steps.action: Capture traceability payload after restart and compare
steps.observed: before==after true; entry count 26 both times

assertions.title: Re-running Act 2 after Act 3 updates Solution Space

steps.observed: HTTP 200 for init, status, entities, versions

steps.expected: Updated domain input should update solution data
steps.observed: Domain flow calls returned HTTP 200 through completion

steps.expected: Solution entities updated, Act 3 marked stale/re-run needed, prior versions preserved
steps.observed: Entities unchanged, /api/status unchanged (step8 still in_progress with steps1-7 pending), versions preserved (26 before/after)

evidence.endpointMismatch: none on pathing: contract path GET /api/map/solution/domain/entities exists and returned 200; behavior mismatch is in stale/status semantics and solution update effect

assertions.issues: Contract outcome not met: rerunning Act 2 did not change solution entities and /api/status did not indicate Act 3 stale/re-run required. Additional runtime issue observed in first attempt: POST /api/domain/input during step4 crashed Act2 worker (500 FunctionClauseError).

frictions.description: `mix bro.init <path>` failed while shared API was running because app startup attempted to bind port 4000 (`:eaddrinuse`).
frictions.resolution: Initialized scoped test projects using `mix run --no-start -e 'Bropilot.init(...)'` instead.

frictions.description: Submitting `/api/domain/input` during step4 caused a 500 and terminated the Act2 worker (FunctionClauseError), which is not documented in curl guidance.
frictions.resolution: Adjusted flow to call `/api/domain/extract` directly for step4 after step3 completion.

frictions.description: Immediately after restart, one call to `/api/map/solution/domain/entities` returned HTTP 500 due `String.to_existing_atom("solution")` error before succeeding on subsequent run.
frictions.resolution: Retried after `/api/init`; endpoint then returned 200 consistently in the validated run.

summary: Tested 3 assertions via curl: 2 passed (VAL-TAPI-007, VAL-CROSS-024), 1 failed (VAL-CROSS-083). API was restarted for VAL-CROSS-024 and ended healthy on localhost:4000.
